{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "86dde0c0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Wakefield: a reentrant cavity (with a field-line animation)\n",
    "\n",
    "A **reentrant** cell — its equator wall overhanging the iris neck — trades a higher gradient for a stronger wake. We run the ABCI wakefield on the reentrant TESLA cell of\n",
    "\n",
    "> V. Shemelin, H. Padamsee, R. L. Geng, *Optimal cells for TESLA accelerating structure*, Nucl. Instrum. Methods A **496** (2003) 1-7,\n",
    "\n",
    "their most reentrant cell (Table 2, `delta_e = +50%`, aperture `Ra = 35 mm`), and also **animate the electric field lines** as the bunch passes.\n",
    "\n",
    "> Needs the bundled `ABCI.exe` (Windows) / `abci` on PATH; ABCI needs a beam pipe at **both** ends."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "712ded53",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:16:44.592169Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:16:44.592051Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.159684Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.159064Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os, tempfile\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from cavsim2d import EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "apply_style()\n",
    "\n",
    "c0 = 299_792_458.0\n",
    "L = c0 / 1.3e9 / 4 * 1e3        # lambda/4 at 1.3 GHz, in mm\n",
    "# [A, B, a, b, Ri, L, Req] (mm) - Shemelin et al. Table 2, delta_e = +50%, Ra = 35 mm\n",
    "cell = [56.56, 37.12, 6.50, 7.34, 35.0, L, 97.76]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "6a3e7c4a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## The reentrant shape\n",
    "\n",
    "The mirrored section shows the overhanging equator."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "3734555f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.161931Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.161682Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.297194Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.296645Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='$z$ [mm]', ylabel='$r$ [mm]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav = EllipticalCavity(1, cell, cell, cell, beampipe='both', name='reentrant')\n",
    "cav.set_workspace(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'reentrant_wf'))\n",
    "cav.plot('geometry', mirror=True)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a0bee9e1",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Run the solve\n",
    "\n",
    "`save_fields=True` additionally turns on ABCI's electric-field-line output, so the field snapshots are written alongside the wake and impedance."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "7cd62ab0",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.299807Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:16:46.299612Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:17:56.527609Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:17:56.526878Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'|k_loss| [V/pC]': 0.2242,\n",
       " 'k_FM [V/pC]': 0.16927,\n",
       " 'k_loss_HOM [V/pC]': 0.05493000000000001,\n",
       " '|k_kick| [V/pC/m]': 6.822}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.run({'MROT': 2, 'wakelength': 20, 'bunch_length': 25, 'save_fields': True})\n",
    "cav.wakefield.qois"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5040a469",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Impedance and wake"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "3db1f330",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:17:56.529064Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:17:56.528934Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.149820Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.149256Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x400 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, (a1, a2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))\n",
    "cav.wakefield.plot_impedance('longitudinal', ax=a1, show=False)\n",
    "cav.wakefield.plot_impedance('transverse', ax=a2, show=False)\n",
    "a1.set_title('longitudinal'); a2.set_title('transverse'); plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "4cf7159c",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.151739Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.151432Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.237467Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.236568Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: title={'center': 'Longitudinal wake'}, xlabel='S [m]', ylabel='$W_\\\\parallel$ [V/pC]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.plot_wake('longitudinal')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "153a98f9",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## The electric field lines\n",
    "\n",
    "`animate_fields()` plays ABCI's field-line snapshots (the inline player is a compact H.264 video, so the whole sequence embeds). Reentrant noses concentrate the field."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "8c4d4021",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.239838Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:17:57.239605Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:17:58.257162Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:17:58.256568Z"
    }
   },

      ]

   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.animate_fields()"
   ]
  },
  {

   "source": [
    "## Where to go next\n",
